tc10_evidence: tc10-fragility/probe.log — Maestro launched the app, connected to Metro, waited for chat-input, took screenshot; no render-surface freeze. The Sprint 02 fragility mode (freeze after any Maestro interaction following expo run:ios) does not reproduce. The Sprint 02 fix path (warm single-session Maestro runs against a pre-warmed simulator) works.

step_results.evidence: App launched, dev-server picker shown, tapped localhost:8081 to connect, dev-menu popup dismissed, login screen reached. Screenshot 01-launch captured.
Tapped e2e-test-login-button; signed in via Clerk dev-keys against the test account e2e-login@jjrnshw9.mailosaur.net.

id:chat-input visible; id:route-on-map-marker NOT visible; id:route-line-on-map-marker NOT visible; literal text 'Discover' NOT visible. Screenshot 02-home-map-and-chat captured. Plan-view-as-landing seam (DISC-002) verified.

Tapped map-header-left-button → drawer opened. id:drawer-nav-settings visible; id:drawer-nav-saved visible; text 'Plan a ride' NOT visible; text 'Discover' NOT visible. Closed drawer. Text 'Filter', 'Sort', 'State' all NOT visible on home. Screenshots 03-drawer-only-settings-saved + 04-home-no-filter-sort-state captured.

extendedWaitUntil id:discovery-suggestion-pill-.* timed out at 30000ms (and again at 120000ms on a follow-up probe). Root cause: backend data integrity issue — the curated_routes table has 104 rows but NONE have geometryStatus==='generated' (the field is not even in convex/schema.ts). use-curated-discovery.ts:97 filters all routes out → empty discovery. This is NOT the simulator-rendering-fragility block; it is a backend data issue (curated catalog missing the geometryStatus field) that would ALSO fail on real hardware. Routes to convex-implementer (DISC-007 is RN-only; WRITE-PROHIBITED for Convex schema/data).
step_results.bypass_path: Real iPhone run would exhibit the SAME failure — this is not a simulator proxy limitation, it is a real backend data defect. AC-1 is BLOCKED on this issue being fixed first, regardless of platform.

step_results.evidence: Depends on STEP 2 succeeding. Flow halted at STEP 2 assertion failure.

Drawer contents verified — only Settings/Saved nav entries; no Plan-a-ride/Discover; no filter/sort/state controls
limitations: Maestro proxy is closest-available for AC-1 — binding evidence is founder's real iPhone run

iOS 26.4 simulator, not a physical device

founder: re-run the full Maestro gate AFTER the backend geometryStatus issue is resolved, then proceed to real-hardware iOS run for AC-1 binding evidence
